enriched_points.expanded_content: Biodegradable polymer-based nanoparticles have shown promise in targeting drugs for cancer and dermatological diseases, enhancing treatment efficacy and reducing side effects.
Clinical studies demonstrate effective drug delivery via nanocarriers, showing improved therapeutic effects in conditions like skin diseases and cancer, with significant patient outcomes.
Nanocarriers offer future potential in treating diverse diseases, including kidney and autoimmune disorders, by optimizing drug delivery mechanisms and enhancing targeted therapies.
